code: import React,{useEffect}from'react';import'./App.scss';import Sidebar from'./components/sidebar/Sidebar';import Chat from'./components/chat/Chat';import Login from'./components/login/Login';import{useAppDispatch,useAppSelector}from'./app/hooks';import{auth}from'./firebase';import{login,logout}from'./features/userSlice';import{ErrorBoundary}from'react-error-boundary';import{ErrorFallBack}from'./utils/ErrorFallBack';import{jsx as _jsx,Fragment as _Fragment,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";function App(){const user=useAppSelector(state=>state.user.user);const dispatch=useAppDispatch();useEffect(()=>{auth.onAuthStateChanged(loginUser=>{console.log(loginUser);if(loginUser){dispatch(login({uid:loginUser.uid,photo:loginUser.photoURL,email:loginUser.email,displayName:loginUser.displayName}));}else{dispatch(logout());}});},[dispatch]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"App",children:user?/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ErrorBoundary,{FallbackComponent:ErrorFallBack,children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Sidebar,{})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Chat,{})]}):/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(_Fragment,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Login,{})})});}export default App;
